clips.name: Gear
clips.description: A short mechanical gear turn / cog ratchet with a metallic, machine-like grind.
clips.use_for: opening hook, machine-start cue, mechanical emphasis

clips.name: Metallic Riser
clips.description: A rising metallic sweep that builds in pitch and intensity toward a peak.
clips.use_for: tension build, reveal ramp, "wait for it" lead-in

clips.name: Click Mouse
clips.description: A single crisp mouse-button click, dry and snappy.
clips.use_for: UI tap, app demo, cursor click, cut-point accent

clips.name: Keyboard Typing
clips.description: A quick burst of mechanical keyboard keystrokes.
clips.use_for: building-in-public montage, coding shot, productivity vibe

clips.name: Wind Woosh
clips.description: An airy wind whoosh that sweeps past, soft attack with a fast decay.
clips.use_for: fast motion transition, swipe cut, scene change

clips.name: Pop
clips.description: A tiny, bright pop / bubble burst, very short.
clips.use_for: micro punchline, sticker/emoji pop, tiny reveal

clips.name: Snap Sound
clips.description: A sharp snap hit with a short resonant tail.
clips.use_for: hard emphasis, reaction beat, clean transition hit

clips.name: Metallic Woosh
clips.description: A slick metallic whoosh sweeping by, futuristic and polished.
clips.use_for: premium product reveal, futuristic sweep, slick motion graphics

clips.name: Camera Flash
clips.description: A camera-flash charge-and-pop with a bright shutter snap.
clips.use_for: before/after reveal, thumbnail moment, freeze-frame ending
